text: Science has a clearer story about open data replication than social media does. Open data replication means sharing research data openly, allowing anyone to verify results. Yet, many studies struggle with reproducibility. Why? Research shows around 50% of studies can’t be replicated. This isn't due to fraud but complexity. And unlike social media hype, science demands scrutiny. Open data can strengthen trust and lead to better health outcomes. It’s a game changer. Follow for more insights on how open data can transform science!
